content:
IVX NEXT BLOCK — LIVE EVIDENCE HARDENING

Work only on:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Convert Live Evidence Dashboard from “current proof view” into trusted live deployment control.

Tasks:

1. Auto-refresh
- Refresh evidence every 60 seconds.
- Show last checked timestamp.
- Show if data is LIVE, STALE, or FAILED.

2. Commit Match
Show:
- Latest GitHub commit SHA
- Live backend commit SHA from /health
- Render deployed commit SHA
- MATCH / MISMATCH

3. Render Deploy History
Show last 10 deploys:
- deploy ID
- status
- commit SHA
- timestamp
- duration
- failure reason if failed

4. Health Metrics
Show:
- /health HTTP status
- response time
- uptime
- API error rate
- last failed check

5. Chat Room Proof
Run test:
- send message
- receive AI reply
- save message
- reload conversation
- verify same message ID persists

6. Supabase Proof
Show:
- conversations count
- messages count
- members count
- waitlist count
- last insert/read test
- RLS/auth status

7. Evidence History
Save every proof run:
- timestamp
- commit SHA
- deploy ID
- health result
- chat result
- Supabase result
- final status

8. Export Proof
Add buttons:
- Export JSON
- Export PDF
- Copy Proof Report

9. Final Status Rules
COMPLETE only if:
- GitHub SHA exists
- Render deploy ID exists
- Render commit matches GitHub
- /health = 200
- Chat send/save/load passes
- Supabase read/write passes
- Frontend loads live

Final output:

LIVE_REFRESH:
COMMIT_MATCH:
RENDER_HISTORY:
HEALTH_METRICS:
CHAT_PROOF:
SUPABASE_PROOF:
EVIDENCE_HISTORY:
EXPORT_PROOF:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:
